title: Velaze Cast Iron Griddle & Grill Pan for Gas & Electric Hobs - 45.5 x 26cm, Double-Sided Usable for BBQ, Camping & Garden
features: PREMIUM BBQ GRIDDLE PLATE-High-quality and robust cast iron processing with long-term durability and perfect heat distribution resistance. Our cast iron griddle is the perfect accessory for cooking and grilling on the grill, hob and oven
REAT FOR ALL SORTS OF RECIPES-This cast iron plate is a good choice for steak and barbecue. Suitable occasion: griddle plate for gas hob,both camping and household are very suitable
EASY TO CLEAN-Super easy to clean up, just wipe it with a paper towel or rinse it with water. It does not stick to the plate and leaves no food residue

GRIDDLE LINES & DEEP RIDGES-The grill plate impresses with a grooved frying surface for low-fat frying with grill effect. With the flat plate you can prepare light and delicious barbecue dishes all year round

CUSTOMER SERVICE-We strive to provide our customers with the best possible experience and continuously improve our products. If you are not satisfied with the use, please contact us. We will help you. Please buy now - click on the shopping cart now
